Description.value: I first open the dishwasher so I can access the interior. I then place the dishes into the dishwasher and close the dishwasher to complete the task.

Need.value: I need to place the dishes into the dishwasher so they can be cleaned.

Description.value: I open the dishwasher, place each dish into the dishwasher, and close the dishwasher to complete the task.

Need.value: I need to access the inside of the dishwasher so I can load the dishes.
I need to pick up the cup and to place it into the dishwasher afterwards.

Step.name: place the cup into the dishwasher

Need.value: I need to move the cup into the dishwasher so it can be cleaned.
I need to close the dishwasher so it does not spread unwelcome odors.
